description: Akamai WAF (from scratch): a large real-world content integration with many deprecated and active commands, multiple hidden type-4 credential params and three type-9 credentials (client token / access token / client secret), generated as the 'Akamai' connector. Exercises the from-scratch scaffold over a high-command-count integration with an Automation capability and a Plain auth profile derived from the Akamai client-secret credentials pair.
